## Problem

What limitation exists today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and where it should be implemented.

## Affected Areas

- [ ] directives
- [ ] schema
- [ ] scripts
- [ ] templates
- [ ] tests
- [ ] docs

## Acceptance Criteria

List objective pass/fail outcomes.

## Regression Impact

Which existing tests/fixtures should be checked?
